phrases.intent_en: Ask if they accept credit cards at cellar
phrases.cultural_note: Payment methods are not listed in the venue context.

likely_response.local: Bazı mahzenler kabul ediyor, genelde nakit bulundurun.
likely_response.translation_en: Some cellars accept it, generally keep cash on hand.

responses.english: Some cellars accept it, generally keep cash on hand.
responses.local: Bazı mahzenler kabul ediyor, genelde nakit bulundurun.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to sit for olive grove view
phrases.cultural_note: No specific terrace or seating area is listed in the venue context.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which wine to pair with goat cheese
phrases.text_local: Keçi peyniri ile hangi şarabı eşleştirmeliyim?
phrases.cultural_note: Venue context does not list specific pairings; defaulting to safety prefix.

likely_response.local: Şarapçıya sorun, Keçi peyniri ile beyaz şarap önerir.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the winemaker, they recommend white wine with goat cheese.

responses.english: Ask the winemaker, they recommend white wine with goat cheese.
responses.local: Şarapçıya sorun, Keçi peyniri ile beyaz şarap önerir.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if breakfast gözleme is made fresh now
phrases.text_local: Kahvaltı gözlemesi şimdi taze yapılıyor mu?
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh preparation details are not listed in the venue context.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is made fresh at the counter.

responses.english: Yes, it is made fresh at the counter.
